title: Adobe CEO to Step Down in Face of Investor Concerns Over AI
description: Adobe Inc. Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen will resign from his position atop the creative software giant amid deep skepticism about the company’s ability to thrive in the AI era.

title: China Becomes Agentic AI’s Biggest Lab With OpenClaw Stampede
description: The wave of excitement may catapult the country to the forefront of the technology as US companies struggle to gain traction among users.

title: Musk’s X to Alter Verification System in Europe, Commission Says
description: Elon Musk’s X, the social network formerly known as Twitter, has agreed to change its verification mechanism in the European Union following a fine of €120 million ($138 million).
